channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Astronomers just found four hidden white dwarf stars near Earth
item.description: Four nearby white dwarf stars have been discovered hiding in plain sight beside brighter red dwarf companions, confirmed by Hubble's ultraviolet observations.

item.title: Scientists finally solved why some frogs survive a deadly fungus
item.description: A deadly fungus has wiped out amphibian populations globally, but some frogs recover. Researchers found that survivors develop powerful immune responses.

item.title: Why have humans collected crystals for 780,000 years? Chimpanzees may hold the answer
item.description: Chimpanzees showed a strong attraction to crystals, preferring them over ordinary stones and examining them with deep curiosity. The findings suggest...

item.title: Popular weight-loss drugs Ozempic and Wegovy may slow biological aging
item.description: Researchers found that semaglutide, the active ingredient in Ozempic and Wegovy, slowed markers of biological aging in adults with HIV, marking the first...
